mapper.sql: select warehouse_id, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, contact_name, contact_phone, address, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from erp_warehouse
mapper.insert: insert into erp_warehouse(warehouse_code, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, contact_name, contact_phone, address, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{warehouseCode}, #{warehouseName}, #{warehouseType}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{address}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete:
delete from erp_warehouse where warehouse_id in
#{warehouseId}
